translated: The level of expression just keeps getting better and better.
Look at the way Shizuku is holding that poster in her right hand...
Seriously, I want this for myself.
It is just too beautiful.
I could stare at it forever.
Seriously.
Maybe I should use this as a reference.
It is seriously good.
When it is zoomed in like this... by the way...
Since she looks so mature, I tried to act a bit more mature myself
while performing her voice.
I can't help but be conscious of it when the art is this wonderful.
Thank you so much.
That was Shizuku.
Next up is...
Minori-chan!
She is bursting with energy!
I love Minori-chan's jumps. You know,
she is always the one jumping the highest during our lives.
She is seriously the personification of Momojan.
That leap...
Minori-chan's full effort really reaches you.
It really does.
This angle is also just irresistible.
You can even see her shoes...
